title: YKHC offers new COVID-19 boosters to protect  against variants
summary: On September 1, the CDC approved the use of updated, bivalent boosters to protect individuals from severe illness caused by COVID-19. YKHC was approved to receive both the Pfizer and Moderna bivalent boosters. These vaccines can only be used for boosters; they cannot be used for a primary vaccinatio...

title: Tribe joins amicus brief in support of Indian Child Welfare Act
summary: The Kenaitze Indian Tribe has joined with other Tribes and Tribal Organizations around the country in an amicus brief in support of the Indian Child Welfare Act and the law’s focus on the best interests of American Indian and Alaska Native children. The brief was filed with the United States Supreme...

title: Planning Commission Meets September 27. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Regular Planning Commission meets September 27, 2022, at 7 P.M. This meeting will be a hybrid meeting held both in person and via Zoom, and will be to review a Sand and Gravel extraction renewal and modifications to a Conditional Use Permit. This hybrid meeting will be held in person and by remot...

title: BSNC’s Board Endorses Mary Peltola’s Reelection to Congress
summary: The Bering Straits Native Corporation (BSNC) Board of Directors announced their endorsement of Representative-elect Mary Peltola for reelection to represent Alaska in the U.S. House of Representatives. Peltola is the first Yup’ik, first Alaska Native and first woman to represent Alaska in Congress....

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 12 September, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 12 September, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Bering Strait Region Residents Advised to Prepare for Storm
summary: Bering Strait region residents are advised to prepare for the incoming storm. The National Weather Service (NWS) has warned about a powerful coastal storm impacting Western Alaska.
